evaluation.summary: Targeted algorithmic optimizations produced speedups in primorial bases but only met the 50% reduction goal for the smallest base, indicating incremental rather than breakthrough improvement.
next_directions: Validate the optimizations on larger primorial bases (e.g., 30030, 510510) and larger sample sizes to assess scalability.
Integrate parallel or GPU‑accelerated techniques to push performance beyond the current modest gains.
Explore adaptive memoization and hybrid segmentation strategies tailored to high‑density primorial sequences for further runtime reduction.
